declarations.description:
Purpose: A segmented control item to be used within an `mc-segmented-control`.
Category: Navigation, Content Display, Data Display
When to use: When you need to present multiple related options in a compact space.
When not to use: For unrelated options or when space is not a concern.
Works with components: mc-segmented-control
Alternative component names: Segmented Button Group, Tabbed Navigation
declarations.name: McSegmentedControlItem

cssParts.description: for changing visuals of text-and-icon wrapper
cssParts.name: `text-and-icon`

slots.description: The default slot where main label goes.
The `sublabel` slot where the sublabel goes.
slots.name: sublabel

slots.description: The `icon` slot where an `mc-icon` or any other forms of graphics go.
slots.name: icon

slots.description: The `trailingicon` slot where an `mc-icon` or any other forms of graphics go.
slots.name: trailingicon

events.description: Dispatched when the toggle button receives focus.
events.name: onfocus

events.description: Dispatched when the toggle button loses focus.
events.name: onblur
